---
title: Proof rendering (HTML)
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: default
      ensureHtmlElements:
        -
          - 'div.proof'
          - '.proof-title'
---

## Proof with content

::: {.proof}
This is a proof with content.
:::

## Named proof

::: {.proof name="Of the main theorem"}
Named proof body.
:::

## Empty proof

::: {.proof}
:::

## Remark

::: {.remark}
This is a remark.
:::
